prompt: A dramatic vertical football transfer announcement poster for {argument name="player name" default="Erling Haaland"} joining {argument name="club name" default="Inter Milan"}, designed in a dark, high-contrast black and electric-blue palette with a gritty cinematic sports-graphic style. The composition features 2 layered portraits of the same player: one oversized close-up bust in the upper center-left, turned in profile and looking upward, showing slick blond hair tied into a short bun with shaved sides; and 1 mid-body action portrait in the lower center, wearing the club’s blue-and-black striped home jersey and raising one index finger upward in a victory gesture. Use a muscular athletic build, intense heroic presence, rim lighting, deep shadows, textured skin detail, and glossy hair highlights. The jersey should include a white sponsor wordmark across the chest, a small white swoosh-style logo, the round club crest, and a tricolor shield patch. Behind the player, place a huge glowing circular Inter-style emblem graphic as a backdrop. Add 3 visible club logos total: 1 small logo at the top right, 1 large fabric flag logo at the bottom left, and 1 crest on the shirt. At the bottom center, include a night view of a modern football stadium with bright floodlights, blending into painterly blue smoke and brush-stroke effects. Across the center, place the player surname in huge rough hand-painted lettering, partially obscured by the figure, plus a large handwritten-style number 9 on the right. Add 8 text elements around the design: top center small text “INTER MILAN”; upper left stacked name text with the player name and a blue “9”; left-middle slogan “NATO PER SEGNARE”; right side vertical text “I M INTER”; right-middle slogan “FORZA INTER PER SEMPRE”; lower right city text “SAN SIRO”; lower right small text “MILANO ITALIA”; bottom center small text “1908” and “LA BENEAMATA”. Also add 1 white signature scribble near the upper-left portrait. The background should be a layered collage of black grunge textures, blue ink splashes, scratches, smoke, and radial light, with a premium social-media sports poster finish, hyper-detailed, sharp, energetic, and poster-ready for a football meme or fan transfer reveal.
translatedPrompt: 一张极具戏剧性的竖版足球转会官宣海报，主题为 {argument name="player name" default="Erling Haaland"} 加入 {argument name="club name" default="Inter Milan"}。设计采用深色、高对比度的黑色与电光蓝配色，呈现出粗犷的电影级体育海报风格。构图包含同一球员的 2 层肖像：上方左侧为一个超大的半身特写，侧脸向上仰望，留着利落的金色短发丸子头，两侧剃短；下方中心为一个半身动作肖像，身穿俱乐部标志性的蓝黑条纹主场球衣，单手食指向上做出胜利手势。人物需具备强壮的运动员体格、强烈的英雄气场，运用轮廓光、深邃阴影、细腻的皮肤纹理和亮泽的发丝高光。球衣胸前应包含白色赞助商文字标识、一个小型的白色钩状 Logo、圆形俱乐部徽章以及三色盾牌补丁。在球员身后，放置一个巨大的发光圆形国际米兰风格徽章图形作为背景。总共添加 3 个可见的俱乐部 Logo：右上角 1 个小 Logo，左下角 1 个大型旗帜 Logo，以及球衣上的 1 个徽章。底部中心融入现代足球场的夜景，明亮的泛光灯与蓝色的绘画烟雾及笔触效果交织在一起。画面中心横跨球员姓氏，采用巨大的粗犷手绘字体，部分被人物遮挡，右侧配有一个巨大的手写风格数字“9”。在设计周围添加 8 处文字元素：顶部中心小字“INTER MILAN”；左上方堆叠的球员姓名及蓝色“9”；左侧中部口号“NATO PER SEGNARE”；右侧垂直文字“I M INTER”；右侧中部口号“FORZA INTER PER SEMPRE”；右下方城市名“SAN SIRO”；右下方小字“MILANO ITALIA”；底部中心小字“1908”和“LA BENEAMATA”。此外，在左上方肖像附近添加 1 个白色的签名涂鸦。背景应为黑色颓废纹理、蓝色墨水溅射、划痕、烟雾和放射状光线的层叠拼贴，呈现出高级社交媒体体育海报的质感，超高细节、锐利、充满活力，随时可用于足球模因或球迷转会官宣。

breakdown.creativeCore: 国际米兰转会海报：一张大胆的电影感足球海报，展示了身着国际米兰球衣的明星前锋，非常适合转会官宣、球迷剪辑和体育模因图制作。
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
breakdown.bestUse: 品牌字标、标题字、活动视觉、字体风格探索

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 字体/Logo image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: close-up, layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: rim light]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
